surfaces_reviewed: App.tsx routing (auth, invite, claim, paywall guards, guest, shared, booking deep link)
AgencyView + AgencyControllerView (My Models, messages, clients, calendar, booking brief)
ClientView + ClientWebApp (Discover, package/shared modes, projects, messages, calendar)

confirmed_ui_findings.title: Chest vs Bust naming and cm hints were inconsistent across Discover, package grid, Guest, and swipe labels
confirmed_ui_findings.notes: Agency save path already mirrors chest=bust in agency_update_model_full payload (AgencyControllerView). Client discovery filters use DB column chest. Some surfaces said Bust, others Chest, and several overlays omitted explicit cm units.

confirmed_ui_findings.title: Dual columns bust and chest in models table
confirmed_ui_findings.notes: Product treats them as the same measurement in cm for agency saves; completeness uses chest ?? bust. Filters and modelFilters prefer chest. Acceptable technical debt; document for engineers.

confirmed_ui_findings.title: Messages: option threads vs B2B org chat vs contextual layers
confirmed_ui_findings.notes: ClientWebApp MessagesView uses tabs (b2bChats vs optionRequests) plus assignment/attention filters. Users must learn two chat families; copy and entry points are separate by design.

confirmed_ui_findings.title: Smart Attention vs unread
confirmed_ui_findings.notes: Attention is action-required workflow signal, not read receipts — aligns with system-invariants; filter pills are duplicated pattern on agency and client messages.

confirmed_ui_findings.title: Invite + model claim tokens both present: sequential finalize (invite first)
confirmed_ui_findings.notes: finalizePendingInviteOrClaim runs invite then claim only after invite success. If invite fails fatally, claim is not attempted in that run; tokens handled per branch. Not a security issue; rare edge.

confirmed_ui_findings.title: Upload parity across all device pickers
confirmed_ui_findings.notes: HEIC conversion and shared uiCopy exist; accept= attributes differ slightly by surface (e.g. chat vs model photos). Recommend periodic manual QA on iOS Safari, Android Chrome, desktop.

accepted_product_complexity: Two chat families (option-scoped vs org B2B) with separate threads
Package vs normal Discover vs shared-project modes with different data sources (invariants documented)
Booking Brief scope UX vs full-row JSONB trust model (docs/BOOKING_BRIEF_SYSTEM.md)
Guest link RPC returns bust only; synonymous with chest for display
fixed_now: uiCopy.modelEdit: explicit (cm) on chest/waist/hips/legs inseam labels
uiCopy.swipe: measurement labels aligned with cm + Chest/Bust wording
ClientWebApp: package grid + discover card measurement overlay uses Chest with chest||bust fallback and cm suffix
GuestView + SharedSelectionView: Chest wording and cm suffix for measurements
manual_review_required: Cross-device upload smoke (HEIC from iPhone, large PNG, PDF in chat)
Owner-only invite affordances when booker tries to invite (already copy-guarded in uiCopy)
